title: lightly cured mediterranean little gem lettuce salad
description: a buttery, crispy mediterranean dish perfect for a romantic date night, featuring fresh little gem lettuce and a delicate cure. this salad is free from onions and garlic, making it suitable for those with sensitivities.

ingredients.name: feta cheese
ingredients.notes: crumbly, high-quality feta for the best flavor

ingredients.name: pistachios
ingredients.notes: unsalted, unsweetened pistachios for a crunchy texture

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: freshly squeezed for the best flavor

instructions: remove the leaves from the little gem lettuce heads and place them in a large bowl.
in a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, and a pinch of salt until well combined.
add the cured lemon to the bowl and stir to coat the little gem lettuce leaves evenly.
crumble the feta cheese over the top of the salad and sprinkle with pistachios.
garnish with chopped fresh dill and serve immediately in copper mugs or individual glass bowls.
cover the salad with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
